heading: Measure of damages

children.label: i
children.text: the amount of the loss suffered by the other person as a result of the breach or failure; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount of the substitute check; and

children.label: B
children.text: interest and expenses (including costs and reasonable attorney’s fees and other expenses of representation) related to the substitute check.

children.heading: Offset of recredits
children.label: 2 Offset of recredits
children.text: The amount of damages any person receives under paragraph (1), if any, shall be reduced by the amount, if any, that the claimant receives and retains as a recredit under section 5006 or 5007 of this title.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If a person incurs damages that resulted in whole or in part from the negligence or failure of that person to act in good faith, then the amount of any liability due to that person under subsection (a) shall be reduced in proportion to the amount of negligence or bad faith attributable to that person.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: 2 Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this subsection reduces the rights of a consumer or any other person under the Uniform Commercial Code or other applicable provision of Federal or State law.
